subject: [GLOBAL] Move to Gitlab-CI
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Move to Gitlab-CI

- add a proper documentation
- configure helms jobs profiles
- move and adapt kubernetes Makefile to gitlab-ci folder .ci
- add an empty gating launcher profile
  conditioned to helm:fast linting success
- comment it out until further use

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Change-Id: Icc88c28b940b59209525019e390963afcccb162f
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>

entries.message:

I suspect this has to be run with chained-ci but I am not sure of that.
